title: Transaction Limit Breach Escalation
description: A risk-and-compliance control workflow that sequences screening, escalation, and approval gates before transaction progression. Focus case: transaction limit breach escalation.
assumptions: Each transaction_case models a single discrete transaction and its associated review lifecycle.
Approver roles and specialist identities are modeled as scarce resources that must be allocated and released.
Screening alerts and evidence documents can be reserved for a case and later released or consumed by approvals.
risks: Resource contention: limited approver or specialist availability could stall case progression.
Incomplete evidence: missing or invalid evidence_document may block approvals and cause manual intervention.
Routing misconfiguration: incorrect binding between case subtypes and escalation_channel could misroute cases.
